description: R-Net frame definitions for RNetMsgBroker. v1.0.1 GPL-3.0-only release: strict JSON keys, CSV export, version diagnostics and deliver target.

frames.summary: Beispiel: Modul kommt aus der CAN-ID, Felder aus den Daten nach #.
PM requests drop to config mode 1
PM requests drop to config mode 0
unknown diagnostics/reserved frame reported from DongleInterface.dll data
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 0
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 1
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 2
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 3
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 4
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 5
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 6
serial number exchange RTR request for sequence 7
configuration transfer data segment with CRC
frame family known to trigger JSM network error
PM sleep all devices / power off
JSM test CAN connection before wake; can turn JSM off if sent while on
JSM serial number heartbeat; PM must see this before profile handshaking
serial number exchange: seq/module, key and serial/challenge data encoded in ID
serial number challenge from PM; challenge values are ignored by devices
serial number exchange sequence range 1F00XXXX through 1F70XXXX
set/report serial number for device slot Z
drop to config mode 0; ends capability mapping and starts run mode
JSMrx select modemap M for parameter exchange
JSMtx end parameter exchange for mode M
JSM programming header for capability exchange
JSMtx check whether pointer X/sub V exists
PMtx no, pointer does not exist
PMtx text chunk for color JSM display (prefix 2P8C0000; remaining bytes are text payload)
R-Net Programmer: set read address XXXX little-endian
R-Net Programmer: read response, last byte status
profile attribute response, same format as 060
return attribute Ss of mode M as data XX
JSMtx select mode M; last mode must be suspended first
PMtx chair angle motor has stopped
PMtx chair angle motor is running
PMtx global motor has stopped, 0 MPH
PMtx drive motor current; little-endian 16-bit; 0x02e8 is about 6A
play four musical tones; length 00-7F, note 00-9C
PM heartbeat; alternates between values 0xC0 and 0x01
PMtx enable motor output after change to drive mode
PMtx enable motor output after change to chair angle mode
after profile change to tilt, step 1 of 3
after profile change to tilt, step 2 of 3
after profile change to tilt, step 3 of 3
unknown alternating module status X={2}, Y={1,2}
PM connected; sent once after serial number exchange
JSMtx device is ready, UI is active
induces error state: speed limited and power level change has no effect
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 0, key 0x47
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 1, key 0xA1
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 2, key 0x62
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 3, key 0xAD
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 4, key 0x2E
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 5, key 0x05
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 6, key 0xB3
BTM serial exchange observed: seq 7, key 0xEC
cJSM cry for help: attempting slot 8 seq 0
cJSM cry for help: attempting slot 8 seq 1
cJSM cry for help: attempting slot 8 seq 2
cJSM cry for help: attempting slot 8 seq 3
cJSM cry for help: retrying with different parameters
cJSM cry for help: slot 8+1 attempt
PM response with computed key 8F value 1C
PM response with computed key C0 value 50
partial decode: x={2,0}, y=1, z=1, possibly chair adjust mode
partial decode: Xx=04, Yy={2,1} in clusters
JSM device heartbeat; 7-byte variant observed in candump/can2RNET traces
